text: The repetition of 'yeah' echoes in my mind, like a mantra or an uncertain agreement with the environment around me. Walking past the glass-walled meeting room, I feel like an observer, distanced yet curious. When I reach the exhibit, the blend of art and language about human construction and nature stimulates reflection. The bright colors and words make me feel both stimulated and oddly at ease. There's creative energy here—a gentle sense of possibility, yet underneath it, a desire to connect more deeply with the meanings present in this space.
